data.title: Solana’s 24-hour DEX trading volume is currently reported at US$2.417 billion, ranking first among all chains
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DefiLlama data shows that the 24-hour DEX transaction volume on Solana is temporarily reported to be US$2.417 billion, ranking first among all chains.

data.title: BitMart has launched GUN perpetual contracts with a maximum leverage of 50 times
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart has launched GUNZ (GUN) perpetual contract at 21:00 (UTC+8) on March 31, 2025. At that time, the GUN/USDT trading pair will be opened with a maximum leverage of 50 times.
Gunzilla Games is a AAA game studio with its own GUNZ blockchain and flagship battle royale shooting game "Off The Grid"

data.title: UBS Predicts Federal Reserve Rate Cuts in 2025
data.description: According to BlockBeats, UBS anticipates that the Federal Reserve will reduce interest rates by 75 to 100 basis points during the remainder of 2025. This forecast reflects expectations of monetary policy adjustments in response to evolving economic conditions.

data.title: First Digital: FDUSD is returning to the $1 anchor
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: FDUSD issuer First Digital said in a statement, "FDUSD market prices show signs of stabilization, and the latest data shows that it is gradually returning to the $1 anchor. As of the latest update, FDUSD is trading at about $0.99."

The tariff announcement has affected the entire global market. In the daily chart, Europe is showing a bearish signal of -0. 31%, China (-0

data.title: Analyst Identifies Key Bitcoin Demand Zone For ‘Substantial Gains’ – Details
data.description:
In a CryptoQuant Quicktake post published today, contributor BorisVest highlighted a key demand zone for Bitcoin (BTC) that could offer investors an opportunity for ‘substantial gains. ’ The analyst used the Active Realized Price (ARP) and the True Market Mean Price (TMMP) to identify this critical zone. Buying Bitcoin Here Could Be Profitable Bitcoin is currently trading approximately 10% higher than its recent local bottom of nearly $77,000, recorded on March 10. However, uncertainty in the market has increased due to US President Donald Trump’s looming trade tariffs, with some analysts predicting that the top cryptocurrency could experience further downside before a trend reversal occurs
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/analyst-identifies-key-bitcoin-demand-zone-for-substantial-gains-details/

data.title: Dogecoin – Can technicals and whales spark a 270% rally for its price?
data.description:
Whales just grabbed 220M DOGE as Dogecoin flashed a rare technical signal.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/dogecoin-can-technicals-and-whales-spark-a-270-rally-for-its-price/

data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Stands at 14, Just One Point Above Yearly Low
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 14. The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization to determine whether the market is shifting towards altcoins or Bitcoin dominance.

data.title: AI interaction protocol Wayfinder launches new badges for PRIME holders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News AI interaction protocol Wayfinder announced the launch of a new badge for PRIME token cachers: Avatar Badge is now activated, the initial snapshot has been completed, and there will be a final snapshot in the future. Holders need to keep the Avatar until the final snapshot to retain the bonus. In addition, a small number of community members who have actively promoted Wayfinder and selflessly contributed their time in the past 8 months have received a unique "Community Builder" badge. This badge will not be issued again, but similar rewards may be launched in the future. The Wayfinder team is working hard to promote the token generation event (TGE).

data.title: Du Jun: Every month, we will publicly select a token to invest $2 million to $10 million and share the basis for our judgment with the community
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News ABCDE co-founder Du Jun posted on the X platform that he will select a token with growth potential from the secondary market every month (excluding Bitcoin), and the single investment amount will be controlled between 2 million and 10 million US dollars.
After each purchase is completed, the corresponding on-chain address and investment logic will be made public to ensure transparency and share their judgment basis with the community.
